name: claude-stack
description: Engineer the Claude Code harness for a repo. Bundles three skills: bootstrap-claude-stack (scaffold the minimal tuning stack into a brand-new project), adopt-claude-stack (survey an existing codebase and retrofit a tailored CLAUDE.md, path-scoped rules, a formatter hook, and MCP servers), and production-readiness-assessor (audit a repo across 13 dimensions and produce an evidence-based scorecard).
